Guest Manual · Far East El Paso, TX

Oasis Farmhouse Retreat

Your home base for pool days, game nights, and wide-open Texas skies.

🛏️ 4 Bedrooms · 7 Beds 👥 Up to 10 Guests 🏊 Heated Pool & Spa 🎮 Arcades & Pool Table 🐾 Pet-Friendly ⭐ Superhost

🕓 Check-In

Standard Check-In
After 4:00 PM
Check-Out
By 11:00 AM

⚡ Early Check-In

Available 12:00 PM – 2:00 PM for a $50 fee (covers an extra cleaner to expedite preparation). Earliest possible is 12:00 PM — could be later depending on how much cleaning we have to do. If we can't accommodate, the fee is fully refunded.

📋 Acknowledgment Required Before Door Code is Sent
Reply via the Airbnb app with your full name, number of guests, any pets, and your arrival time + "Acknowledged." Your code will be sent 30 minutes before your stated arrival time.
🌙 After-Hours Same-Day Bookings (9 PM – 6 AM): Call us at 707-386-5163 or 707-386-4984 to verify. Allow at least 90 minutes prep time after your check-in window.

🔑 Keypad Door Lock

Self check-in — no key exchange needed

▶ Watch: Keypad Tutorial

Short video showing exactly how to enter and lock the door

  1. Make sure the keypad is lit up
  2. Enter your 6-digit code followed by #
  3. To lock: hold down the # button
  4. ⚠️ After 3 wrong entries the keypad disables — contact host to reset
🔐 The code is active for the full duration of your reservation once you've sent your Acknowledgment.

🏊 Pool & Spa

Heated pool set to 85°F · Spa set to 100°F

💰 Heating: $80/day — must be requested at least 24 hours before check-in. Heater will NOT be turned on until payment is received. Paying a day prior is recommended in case of bad weather.
🚫 Pool/spa heating is NOT available May – August or when outdoor temperatures exceed 90°F. During summer the spa heater cannot be on during the day.
❄️ Cold weather notice: When outdoor temps drop below 50°F, we cannot guarantee the spa reaches or maintains 100°F. Heating performance may vary.

🕐 Heater Hours

Heating shuts off from 12:00 AM – 7:00 AM. Temperature typically stays warm through the night.

⚠️ After-Arrival Request

If you request heating after arrival, there is a $25 service fee for a technician to turn it on.

🌬️ High Winds

If we have high winds, the heater must remain off to prevent equipment damage.

🎛️ Pool Controls

🔄 Switching Between Pool & Spa Heating

The pool and spa heaters are separate systems — only one can run at a time. We heat the pool first, then switch to the spa on request. During switchover, spa water will overflow into the pool — this is completely normal.

🚰 How to Switch Heating Direction

  • The two valves are labeled directly on the pipes: POOL VALVE (left) and SPA VALVE (right)
  • To heat the pool — open the Pool Valve, close the Spa Valve
  • To heat the spa — open the Spa Valve, close the Pool Valve
  • The black lever handle in the center controls the direction of water flow — guests are welcome to adjust the valve direction as needed
🚫 Do NOT touch the pool pump or heater temperature settings. Tampering with the pump or temp controls can damage the equipment and may result in a repair fee.

💡 Wall Panel Controls (Backyard)

  • Pool Light — left wall panel
  • Spa Light & Jet — right wall panel
🔧 Contact us immediately if heating seems inadequate.
class="card">

💧 Water Level

Keep water above the skimmer drain — if it drops too low, the heater shuts off automatically. When heating is on, water evaporates faster. We recommend topping off with a hose for about 1 hour every two days. Let us know if you'd like us to handle it.

🔧 Pool Cleaning Days

Pool maintenance occurs every Wednesday, 11 AM – 2 PM (every other Wednesday in winter).

🚨 Safety

  • Deep end is over 5 feet — supervise children at all times
  • No diving or running in the pool area
  • Friends or family visiting temporarily are not allowed to use the pool
  • By using pool/spa you assume all responsibility and waive legal claims against the host

📋 House Rules

✅ Acknowledgment

Reply via Airbnb app with your full name, number of guests, pets, and arrival time + "Acknowledged." Door code sent 30 min before stated arrival — not before.

🎉 No Parties or Gatherings — strictly prohibited. Violation = immediate removal with no refund.

🤫 Quiet Hours

10:00 PM – 7:00 AM per El Paso Noise Ordinance. If authorities are called due to a noise complaint, you will be asked to leave with no refund.

🐾 Pets

Pets welcome with prior approval. Unauthorized pets incur a $150 fee. Pick up after your pet in the backyard.

🚬 No Indoor Smoking

$200 fee for indoor smoking.

📹 Exterior Cameras

The property has exterior-only cameras including a doorbell camera that records sound. Footage may be used for Airbnb claims if necessary.

⭐ Forgotten Items

We are not responsible for items left behind. Contact us ASAP and we'll try to retrieve before the next guest checks in.

💲 Additional Charges

ViolationFee
Unauthorized guest (per person)$25
Unauthorized pet + cleaning$150
Unauthorized party cleaning$200
Indoor smoking$200
Missed garbage collection (bins not out by 6 AM Wednesday)$60
After-arrival pool heat request$25 service fee
Stains on floors/upholstery$75–$100
Pet waste left in backyard$75–$100
Trash left in pool$75–$100

🗑️ Trash Day — Wednesday

🗓️ Pickup Day: Wednesday — place bins at the curb by 6:00 AM (or the night before). Gray bin = trash · Blue bin = recycling (every other week).

📋 Official ESD Rules (City of El Paso)

  • Bins must be at the curb by 6:00 AM on collection day
  • Leave at least 5 feet of clearance between bins and any mailbox, fence, wall, car, or tree
  • Keep blue bin at least 3 feet away from the gray bin
  • Lid opening and arrow on both bins must face the street
  • All garbage must be bagged before placing in the gray bin
  • Recyclables must be placed loose in the blue bin — never in plastic bags
  • 🚫 No glass in the blue bin — take to a City Collection Station
  • 🌬️ On high-wind days (40+ mph gusts), ESD may skip blue bin collection

💲 Missed Collection Fee

If bins are not out on time and collection is missed, the $60 garbage company fee will be passed on to the guest. Please let us know the night before if you need help getting the bins out.

📅 June 2026 Trash Calendar

Wednesdays are your pickup days. Recycling (blue bin) is every other week — confirm your specific week at elpasoesd.net or call (915) 212-6000.

🛝 Safety & Liability

We are not responsible for injuries sustained while using the backyard, patio, beds, toddler playpen, swimming pool, spa, or any other areas or items considered dangerous. Please supervise children and guests at all times.

🏁 Checkout — By 11:00 AM

Please leave the house as you generally found it

  1. Take out all trash — bag it and place in the bins
  2. Wash all used dishes
  3. Remove all belongings and any food
  4. Place used towels in the washer and start a load
  5. Leave used blankets on the floor (not on beds)
  6. Turn off all lights and TVs
  7. Log out of any streaming accounts
  8. Lock the door — hold down the # button on the keypad
For accountability, please message us through the Airbnb app rather than calling or texting.

☕ Enjoy a Coffee on Us!

After your stay, send us a screenshot of your review on the Airbnb app and we'll send you a complimentary Starbucks eGift card!

Prefer cash? We can send $10 via Cash App, Apple Pay, or Zelle instead.

Your feedback helps us improve the experience for future guests. We truly appreciate it! 🙏

🍽️ Local Restaurants

Top-rated spots near the retreat — all 4.5 ⭐ or higher

⚠️ We are not affiliated with any of these restaurants or venues. These are community recommendations only. Hours and details may change — always verify before visiting.

🌮 Mexican

  • El Taquito — ⭐ 5.0 · 1422 Airway Blvd · Famous flautas, chilaquiles & home-style Mexican · Mon–Sat 8 AM–3 PM · (915) 778-7170
  • El Taquero Comer — ⭐ 4.5 · N Zaragoza area · Authentic street-style tacos locals love
  • L&J Cafe — ⭐ 4.5 · Classic El Paso Tex-Mex institution · enchiladas, tamales & famous salsa
  • Margie's Cafe Canteen — ⭐ 4.5 · N Zaragoza area · Great neighborhood Mexican spot

🍔 Burgers

  • Toro Burger Bar — ⭐ 4.5 · 2106 N Zaragoza Rd Ste B201 · 4th Best Burger in Texas · Kobe beef, craft burgers, great margaritas · (915) 234-2554

🍕 Pizza

  • Game Day Pizzeria — ⭐ 4.5 · Handcrafted pizza, wings & classic game-day food · lively sports-bar atmosphere · great for groups
  • Humo Woodfire Oven Kitchen — ⭐ 4.5 · N Zaragoza area · Authentic wood-fired Neapolitan pizza

🥟 Chinese

  • Shan Dong Chinese Restaurant — ⭐ 4.5 · Top-rated Chinese near Zaragoza · hand-pulled noodles & dumplings
  • Grill Noodles Bar — ⭐ 4.5 · N Zaragoza area · Authentic ramen, noodles & Asian dishes

🍣 Japanese

  • Teriyaki Madness — ⭐ 4.5 · Japanese-inspired teriyaki bowls with chicken, steak, tofu & veggies · fast & fresh
  • bb.q Chicken El Paso — ⭐ 4.5 · N Zaragoza area · Korean-style crispy chicken, popular with locals

🫒 Greek / Mediterranean

  • Lamezze Restaurant — ⭐ 4.8 · 210 N Stanton St #4 (Downtown EP) · Moroccan shawarma, lamb burger, Greek wraps, craft cocktails · one of EP's best kept secrets

🌴 Caribbean

  • Cassava — ⭐ 4.8 · 1831 N Zaragoza Rd Ste 115 · Veteran-owned Puerto Rican restaurant · traditional dishes, pan sobao & desserts · Wed–Sun 11:30 AM · (915) 313-5134
  • Da Real Aloha BBQ — ⭐ 4.5 · N Zaragoza area · Hawaiian-Caribbean BBQ plates

🎯 Things To Do Nearby

⚠️ We are not affiliated with any of these venues. Hours, admission, and availability may change — always verify before visiting.

🌊 Oasis Water Park

The closest city water park — right in your ZIP code!

  • 📍 13501 Jason Crandall Dr, El Paso, TX 79938
  • El Paso's only surfing machine · lazy river · water slides · kiddie pool · climbing wall · cabanas & café
  • 🗓️ Opens annually in late May through Labor Day weekend
🗺️ Google Maps 🌊 epwaterparks.com

🪨 Hueco Tanks State Park & Historic Site

A National Historic Landmark right in 79938 — world-class bouldering, ancient pictographs & stunning desert scenery.

  • 📍 6900 Hueco Tanks Rd #1, El Paso, TX 79938 · (915) 857-1135
  • Bouldering & rock climbing · hiking trails · Native American pictographs thousands of years old
  • 💲 $7/adult · Kids 12 & under free
  • 🕐 Oct–Apr: 8 AM–6 PM daily · May–Sep: Fri–Sun 7 AM–7 PM, Mon–Thu 8 AM–6 PM
  • ⚠️ Reservations strongly recommended — site fills up fast on weekends
🗺️ Google Maps 🏕️ Reserve Online

🎬 Gamescape by Cinemark

The first Gamescape in the entire country — right here in East El Paso! Opened February 2025, it's the ultimate all-in-one entertainment destination.

  • 📍 13361 Gateway Blvd W, El Paso, TX 79928 · (915) 603-5223
  • 7 movie auditoriums incl. 2 XD screens, D-Box & 3D · Luxury loungers · Full bar & restaurant
  • 18 bowling lanes · Laser tag · Rock climbing & ropes course · Arcade games
  • 🕐 Mon–Thu 11 AM–Midnight · Fri–Sun 9 AM–1 AM
